title: ajuga tsukubana
intro: Ajuga tsukubana, also known as bugleweed, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to Japan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Ajuga tsukubana include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Ajuga tsukubana is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
